step_rationale: Metoprolol-regulated; hydrogen-sulfide synthesis enzyme, off atherothrombotic pathway.
mechanism: CSE-mediated H₂S generation is a metoprolol target that modulates cardioprotection and vascular remodeling post-MI.

references.title: Metabolomic profiling of metoprolol-induced cardioprotection in a murine model of acute myocardial ischemia.
